name: Shanxi Xinghuacun Fen Wine Factory Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shanxi Xinghuacun Fen Wine Factory Co.,Ltd. produces and sells wine in China. It offers Fenjiu, Zhuyeqing, and other wine series products. The company also researches, develops, produces, and sells liquor; and invests in enterprises, as well as offers consulting services. It provides its wine and liquor products through direct sales force and wholesale agents. The company was formerly known as Shanxi Xinghuacun Fen Win Factory. The company was founded in 1949 and is based in Fenyang, China. Shanxi Xinghuacun Fen Wine Factory Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Shanxi Xinghuacun Fenjiu Group Co., Ltd.
